description_long: This factory building is a rectangular, two-story structure with a flat roof and a utilitarian, industrial appearance. The exterior is primarily composed of gray concrete or cement panels, accented by dark red-brown horizontal bands and metal fixtures. The roof features several pieces of rooftop machinery, including HVAC units, vents, and a small rooftop enclosure, suggesting active industrial use. The building has multiple external staircases, small industrial windows, and a prominent main entrance with a reinforced door. The surrounding area includes a paved sidewalk and a section of road, indicating its placement in an urban or industrial district. The overall design is functional, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing practicality and durability.
description: A two-story, gray concrete factory building with red-brown accents, rooftop machinery, and external staircases, set alongside a paved road and sidewalk.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance door, two external staircases, and several small windows.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting large industrial windows, rooftop machinery, and the adjacent road.
description_view_2: Side view with a single staircase, utility boxes, and a secondary entrance or service area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying a mostly blank wall with rooftop machinery visible above.
